'''âp-t-p''' ('''patapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jowl|jowl]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jowl|jowl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-t-p
|-
! Lemma
| patapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:patapithi|patapithi]] || [[word:patapiji|patapiji]] || [[word:patapishi|patapishi]] || [[word:patapi|patapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pataputhuth|pataputhuth]] || [[word:patapujuj|patapujuj]] || [[word:patapushush|patapushush]] || [[word:patap|patap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pataputhu|pataputhu]] || [[word:patapuju|patapuju]] || [[word:patapushu|patapushu]] || [[word:patapu|patapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:patapufuth|patapufuth]] || [[word:patapufuj|patapufuj]] || [[word:patapufush|patapufush]] || [[word:patapuf|patapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:patapethe|patapethe]] || [[word:patapeje|patapeje]] || [[word:patapeshe|patapeshe]] || [[word:patape|patape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:patapothoth|patapothoth]] || [[word:patapojoj|patapojoj]] || [[word:pataposhosh|pataposhosh]] || [[word:patap|patap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:patapotho|patapotho]] || [[word:patapojo|patapojo]] || [[word:pataposho|pataposho]] || [[word:patapo|patapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:patapofoth|patapofoth]] || [[word:patapofoj|patapofoj]] || [[word:patapofosh|patapofosh]] || [[word:patapof|patapof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:patapĂŻf|patapĂŻf]] || [[word:patapĂŻf|patapĂŻf]] || [[word:patapĂŻf|patapĂŻf]] || [[word:patapĂŻf|patapĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:patapĂŻfĂŻf|patapĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:patapĂŻfĂŻf|patapĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:patapĂŻfĂŻf|patapĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:patapĂŻfĂŻf|patapĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:patapĂŻf|patapĂŻf]] || [[word:patapĂŻf|patapĂŻf]] || [[word:patapĂŻf|patapĂŻf]] || [[word:patapĂŻf|patapĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:patapĂŻf|patapĂŻf]] || [[word:patapĂŻf|patapĂŻf]] || [[word:patapĂŻf|patapĂŻf]] || [[word:patapĂŻf|patapĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:patapĂŠthĂŠ|patapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:patapĂŠjĂŠ|patapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:patapĂŠshĂŠ|patapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:patapĂŠ|patapĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:patapathath|patapathath]] || [[word:patapajaj|patapajaj]] || [[word:patapashash|patapashash]] || [[word:patap|patap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:patapatha|patapatha]] || [[word:patapaja|patapaja]] || [[word:patapasha|patapasha]] || [[word:patapa|patapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:patapafath|patapafath]] || [[word:patapafaj|patapafaj]] || [[word:patapafash|patapafash]] || [[word:patapaf|patapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:patapasha|patapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopatapasha|gopatapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipatapasha|gokipatapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:patapnĂŒsha|patapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopatapnknĂŒsha|gopatapnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipatapnĂŒsha|gokipatapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:patapshĂ«sha|patapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopatapnkshĂ«sha|gopatapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipatapshĂ«sha|gokipatapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pataprosha|pataprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopatapnkrosha|gopatapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipataprosha|gokipataprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:patapmusha|patapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopatapnkmusha|gopatapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipatapmusha|gokipatapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:patapsherasha|patapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopatapnksherasha|gopatapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipatapsherasha|gokipatapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:patapngasha|patapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopatapnkngasha|gopatapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipatapngasha|gokipatapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:patapyasha|patapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopatapnkyasha|gopatapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipatapyasha|gokipatapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:patapyamasha|patapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopatapnkyamasha|gopatapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipatapyamasha|gokipatapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:patapnĂŒshĂ«sha|patapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopatapnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gopatapnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipatapnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokipatapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:patapnĂŒrosha|patapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopatapnknĂŒrosha|gopatapnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipatapnĂŒrosha|gokipatapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:patapnĂŒmusha|patapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopatapnknĂŒmusha|gopatapnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipatapnĂŒmusha|gokipatapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:patapshĂ«nĂŒsha|patapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopatapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gopatapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipatapshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokipatapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:patapshĂ«rosha|patapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopatapnkshĂ«rosha|gopatapnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipatapshĂ«rosha|gokipatapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:patapshĂ«musha|patapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopatapnkshĂ«musha|gopatapnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipatapshĂ«musha|gokipatapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:patapronĂŒsha|patapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopatapnkronĂŒsha|gopatapnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipatapronĂŒsha|gokipatapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:pataproshĂ«sha|pataproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopatapnkroshĂ«sha|gopatapnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipataproshĂ«sha|gokipataproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:patapromusha|patapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopatapnkromusha|gopatapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipatapromusha|gokipatapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:patapmunĂŒsha|patapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopatapnkmunĂŒsha|gopatapnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipatapmunĂŒsha|gokipatapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:patapmushĂ«sha|patapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopatapnkmushĂ«sha|gopatapnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipatapmushĂ«sha|gokipatapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:patapmurosha|patapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopatapnkmurosha|gopatapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipatapmurosha|gokipatapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:patap|patap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:pĂŠtĂŠp|pĂŠtĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopatap|hopatap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hopĂŠtĂŠp|hopĂŠtĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopatap|hohopatap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopĂŠtĂŠp|hohopĂŠtĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒpatap|nĂŒpatap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒpĂŠtĂŠp|nĂŒpĂŠtĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒpatap|nĂŒnĂŒpatap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒpĂŠtĂŠp|nĂŒnĂŒpĂŠtĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻpatap|nĂŻpatap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻpĂŠtĂŠp|nĂŻpĂŠtĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻpatap|nĂŻnĂŻpatap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻpĂŠtĂŠp|nĂŻnĂŻpĂŠtĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupatap|lupatap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lupĂŠtĂŠp|lupĂŠtĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupatap|lulupatap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupĂŠtĂŠp|lulupĂŠtĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipatap|lipatap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lipĂŠtĂŠp|lipĂŠtĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipatap|lilipatap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipĂŠtĂŠp|lilipĂŠtĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopatap|kopatap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kopĂŠtĂŠp|kopĂŠtĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopatap|kokopatap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopĂŠtĂŠp|kokopĂŠtĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepatap|kepatap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kepĂŠtĂŠp|kepĂŠtĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepatap|kekepatap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepĂŠtĂŠp|kekepĂŠtĂŠp]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
